name: NYC Times Square VR Travel Giant's View

reviews.review_description: i hate this game bc u have no hands and you are just walking this game smells like pepe

On New York's Times Square no day is like other. 
Visiting it in this immersive VR app gives a realistic impression of the goings-on there and more, you perceive more from the hustle and bustle, because here, in the app you have 360 view from a heightened position of the camera. This is of value especially when you want to peep in large pockets of crowds present everywhere, surrounding hyperactive street performers...
This app is horrible!! It does not play right as it freezes up every ten seconds and it very blurry, would like to get a refund if I can.
